title: petizer 3-PACK Squeaky Dog Ball Toys ，Dogs Chew Spiky Ball ， Floatable Dog Pool toy,Toss Fetch Toys for Puppy Rubber TPR, Teeth Cleaning for Small and Medium
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL & SAFE: This training and interactive toy is made of food grade, non-toxic,soft TPR (BPA free), make it hard to be broken and spikes buffer on the surface of the ball prevent your puppies from choke.Keep your pet safe during playing.

SQUEAKY,BOUNCY,FLOATABLE: This ball toy has one built-in squeaker to encourage pets’ instinctual hunt and play behavior. Meanwhile ,thanks to the bouncy, buoyant design, allow to play tossing and fetching games with pets on lawn,ground, lake or pool, that enrich the human-animal bond .

IMPROVES DENTAL HEALTH:Unique shape with spikes help prevent plaque and tartar buildup as dogs chew.Meanwhile,it tends to satisfy a dog’s natural instinct to chew to massage gums and improve dental health while dogs play.

FOR SMALL&MEDIUM CHEWERS:The ball toy comes with a diameter of 6.5 cm makes the game funny when it bounces. Not too big, not too small, the ball is perfect for puppies and medium dogs that love to chew.
PERFECT GIFT FOR PET&SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: Worry-free 12-month warranty and lifetime customer service.
